## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX Labs' SEO and content marketing services for Attio, focusing on strategy and implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Attio's current traffic is 99% branded; significant opportunity for non-branded organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs offers a comprehensive SEO and content strategy, including technical SEO, content creation, and programmatic approaches](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Branca needs to build an internal case for SEO investment, addressing concerns about content quality and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [A blog redesign and clear content categorization strategy are needed to support the SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Landscape for Attio

  - [99% of Attio's traffic is branded, indicating a strong brand but weak organic presence](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Only 0.02% of traffic goes to content/blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Domain authority is okay but lags behind competitors](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Estimated $150-200k monthly spend on paid search](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### GrowthX Labs' SEO Approach

  - [Comprehensive strategy including technical SEO, content creation, and programmatic approaches](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, brand-aligned content that addresses specific user intents](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Use of advanced workflows for keyword research, content clustering, and assignment creation](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Editorial process involves human editors for quality control and brand voice alignment](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Capability to produce 100,000 words of content per month with weekly audits and updates](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)

### Content Strategy Ideas

  - [Develop a unique, edgy brand voice that stands out in the CRM space](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Create a "growth list" featuring profiles of fast-growing companies (potential Attio customers)](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Explore the "Zero to IPO" concept, aligning with Attio's trademark](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Consider a satirical glossary addressing pain points of CRM users and sales professionals](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)

### Technical SEO and Site Structure

  - [GrowthX Labs offers technical SEO audits and recommendations as part of their service](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Suggestion to redesign Attio's blog for better content organization and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Discussion on how to structure content categories (e.g., product announcements vs. educational content)](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)

### Visual Content and Brand Alignment

  - [Options for creating visuals include using brand templates, stock imagery, or AI-generated illustrations](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs can work with existing brand guidelines or help develop a visual strategy](https://fathom.video/share/s8p2toC--MgS3ZJuuTML-yzCy1Jx3xKt?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
